title: icy jamaican codfish fritters
description: a light and romantic jamaican dish featuring hp-sauce, beurre-monte, and keto-friendly ingredients.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together codfish, flour, baking powder, salt, and black pepper.
In a separate bowl, whisk together egg and onion.
Add the egg mixture to the codfish mixture and stir until just combined.
Heat the beurre-monte in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Add the hp-sauce to the beurre-monte and stir until combined.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the codfish mixture into balls and flatten slightly into patties.
Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
When the oil is hot, add the codfish patties and cook until golden brown, about 4 minutes per side.
Serve the fritters hot with the hp-beurre-monte sauce spooned over the top.
Garnish with chopped chives if desired.
